title: NeoCraft Gardens & Gadgetry
description: “NeoCraft Gardens & Gadgetry” is a delightful, vibrant modpack centered on the Farmers Delight and Create universes, making it perfect for players who love agriculture, cooking, automation, and creative problem-solving—without overwhelming themselves.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b88b0e1287fad39f8f61736dc324ae794e42d12_0.webp)
🌾 Pack Overview
🎯 What It Does:
Custom terralith config: Tweaks to biomes size to make them larger and more gradual in temp changes.
Build height change max height can be over 640 max depth -320
crazy deep oceans for those rapture builders.
Screenshot & my server seed: 3627388006207208203
All world gen configs for server side are added in this pack.
some mods are Curseforge only for detailed list of server side mods go on over to my discord.

Custom shader mapping with BSL: Also gonna be attempting with complementary shaders as well.

Goal is 100% of all mods added to have shader mapping, What this means is now mods like chipped, croptopia, farmers delight and its addons will now properly be lit, sway and move with all base game blocks while using the shader. No more static modded objects!!! Currently about 20% done with this.

Close to Feature pairity with most up to date minecraft versions with backport mods:

Vanilla Backport, VBP: Mob variants compat, Copper Age Backport.

Farm-to-table experience with rich food systems:

Farmers Delight, Culinaire’s Delights, Rustic & Corn Delights, Crabbers/Crabbers Delight, Barbeques Delight, Cratedelights, Bells & Whistles, Fruits Delight, Lenders/Croptopia Delight, and Brewing Chewing build deep culinary progression.

Creative machinery & automation with Create:

Base Create tools plus addons like Create Enchantment Industry, Create Factory, Create Factory Logistics, Create Copper/Zinc, Create Confectionery, Create Deep Dark, Create Dragons Plus, Create Winery, Integrated Farming, Better Villagers,Create Steam 'n' Rails and more.

Immersive world immersion:

Mods like Aquaculture Delight, Underwater/Village Expansions, SnowRealMagic, Auroras, Waves, Geysers, SkyVillages, and Biomes We’ve Gone bring living, breathing ecosystems.

Performance & UI polish:

Featuring Sodium, Iris, Lithium, MoreCulling, AsyncParticles, AmbientEnvironment, ParticleRain, Visuality, and configurability tools for smooth, optimized, and accessible gameplay.

✨ Why It Works:
Beginner-friendly: Simple food crafting, gentle automation ramps, and intuitive machine setups.

Chef-approved: Build elaborate kitchens, farm plots, and even vineyards/breweries.

Creative-flexible: Balance exploration, farming, cooking, building, and automation all in one pack. 

Made mostly for me and the wife who loves stardew.
For server side pack and config please reach out via my discord.
This is planned to be a LTS for 1.21.1 Me, the Wife, and some friends are using this for our "Forever" world. And thanks to mods like Vanilla backport we dont really have a need to update.
